title: CP0 Comes to Egghead
description: On pages 7–9, this part focuses on Unknown person #7, Robin, Unknown person #8, Unknown person #9, Lilith, Shaka as Vegapunk’s satellites reveal the island’s technology and ancient past while CP0 approaches and Bonney pursues the truth about Kuma.
scene: Vegapunk’s satellites reveal the island’s technology and ancient past while CP0 approaches and Bonney pursues the truth about Kuma.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Heeeeeh...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Sounds like you're not really interested!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hmmm... I think a person that can make everyone happy is good...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm not interested in being a hero though.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Moving on, why do you wanna leave this place?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Yes, about that...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The more I try to create this energy I seek...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...that dynamic power source that was able to power this ancient robot soldier.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I've gotten so close to finding out about that ancient energy! It is my nature as a scientist that I want to take a peek at it!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If I unravel the strings of the forbidden history, what on earth will I comprehend?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: in the course of inherited my friend's will...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I am quickly getting closer to the truth.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: GYA!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: WAAH!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: WHA...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: 2427. to the State of

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well, to put it short, I stepped too deep into the forbidden story!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I will be eliminated by the world government!

dialogue.speaker: Robin
dialogue.text: Just like what they did to ohara!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That ruckus is probably being caused by CPO...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: zero?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: CPO are those who only act under orders of the celestial dragons...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: What's CPO? It's not CPP?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They are at the top of CiPher Pol!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It is said to be an Omen of an occurrence or a major historical event!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What an incredibly futuristic city! I'm so excited!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Cipher Pol? Don't they usually wear black suits?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why aren't they entering through the Port Like Always?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Hey!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It seems like 2 sea beast weapons were destroyed along the coast!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Don't tell me those people are intruders...

dialogue.speaker: Lilith
dialogue.text: Shaka, CPO is on the island!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: How did they get through the port?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: GYAAAH!! THEY'RE INSIDE!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I hate them! Get out of here, Rob Lucci!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Along the coast, their ship fell prey to the sea beasts weapons!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: It seems they rejected our request!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They foresaw that and used an ability to enter this island.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Looks like they used S-bear. They're resolved to fight even if it costs them their ship. If that's what they want then we have no choice!

summary: This part advances the Egghead / Vegapunk Truth through 39 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
